sample_requests: Combine three cohorts at the genus level with combine_studies and report the obs['study'] breakdown
Run a random-effects DESeq2 meta-analysis across 3 cohorts and report top-12 features with 95% CI and Cochran's I2
Compare wilcoxon / deseq2 / ancombc at the meta level - which method recovers planted features first
Diagnose whether a 'significant' meta-hit at FDR 0.05 has acceptable cross-cohort agreement (low I2)
Run a fixed-effects meta-analysis and explain when it is appropriate vs random-effects
Generate a diagnostic combined-PCoA to spot whether study effect dominates the disease effect

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/micro/_meta.py. Synthetic 3-cohort demo with planted features serves as the future smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
